children.heading: Grants to States and local educational agencies
children.label: a Grants to States and local educational agencies
children.text: For the purpose of carrying out part A, there are authorized to be appropriated $2,295,830,000 for each of fiscal years 2017 through 2020.
$468,880,575 for each of fiscal years 2017 and 2018;
